name: FlirtyChatBot
description: AI-powered flirty Telegram chat bot (Pyrogram + Groq), single-repo, Docker-based

API_ID.description: Telegram API ID — https://my.telegram.org se lo

API_HASH.description: Telegram API Hash — https://my.telegram.org se lo

SESSION_STRING.description: Optional — assistant/userbot session string (generate_session.py se banao)

GROQ_API_KEY.description: Free API key — https://console.groq.com se lo

START_IMG.description: Optional — /start aur thank-you panel ki banner image URL
